author: TrippleDutch
title: Stuttering
content: I bought the app to enjoy my music from iCloud, local driv and local server streaming, but every song I play is stuttering. Other apps did not have the problem. A waste of good money

author: Joe SixApps
title: seems nice
content: ..but very poor explanation. How to import .mp3-files?  How to connect to exiting iTunes-library?   I have to find out myself, I suppose?
